payload.title: Long Island Rail Road Financial and Ridership Reports – August 2023
payload.description: Monthly financial and ridership report for the Long Island Rail Road covering August 2023, including budget performance, revenue, expenses, staffing, and performance indicators.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA logo, consisting of the letters 'MTA' in white inside a dark blue circle.

tool_args.label: Total Revenue August YTD 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Total revenue of $656.1 million was $20.3 million higher than the forecast.

tool_args.label: Ridership Change vs 2019 Pre-COVID
tool_args.raw_text: (30.8)% below 2019 pre-COVID levels (adjusted for the same number of workdays)

payload.context: adjusted for the same number of workdays

tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue August YTD 2023
tool_args.raw_text: farebox revenue of $364.6 million was $9.8 million higher than the forecast

tool_args.label: Total Expenses Before Non-Cash Liability Adjustments
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $1,446.0 million were $76.4 million or 5.0% favorable to the forecast

payload.claim_text: Labor Expenses were $38.2 million favorable to the forecast through August 2023, primarily driven by vacant positions and associated fringe costs.
payload.subject: LIRR Labor Expenses

payload.claim_text: Non-Labor Expenses were $44.6 million favorable to the forecast through August 2023.
payload.subject: LIRR Non-Labor Expenses

tool_args.label: Total Overtime $0.5M Unfavorable YTD
tool_args.raw_text: Total overtime was $(0.5) million unfavorable. Non-reimbursable was $(1.6) million unfavorable and reimbursable was $1.1 million favorable.

payload.claim_text: Total overtime was $(0.5) million unfavorable through August 2023. Non-reimbursable was $(1.6) million unfavorable and reimbursable was $1.1 million favorable.
payload.subject: LIRR Overtime

tool_args.label: Staffing Vacancies End of August 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Total headcount at the end of August was 7,707, 205 positions lower than the forecast. The vacancies were primarily in Customer Service, Equipment, and various administrative departments.

payload.claim_text: Total headcount at the end of August was 7,707, 205 positions lower than the forecast. The vacancies were primarily in Customer Service, Equipment, and various administrative departments.
payload.subject: LIRR Staffing

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company expenses
tool_args.raw_text: Expenses for Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMCOOC) are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations.

payload.claim_text: Expenses for Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMCOOC) are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations.
payload.subject: LIRR Performance Indicators

tool_args.label: Electric Power Expenses $15.7M Favorable
tool_args.raw_text: Electric Power expenses were $15.7 million favorable (primarily due to lower consumption, partially offset by higher rates).

payload.claim_text: Electric Power expenses were $15.7 million favorable to the forecast through August 2023, primarily due to lower consumption, partially offset by higher rates.
payload.subject: LIRR Electric Power Expenses

tool_args.label: Materials and Supplies $20.6M Favorable
tool_args.raw_text: Materials and Supplies were $20.6 million favorable (primarily due to the timing of modifications and RCM activity for revenue fleet

payload.claim_text: Materials and Supplies were $20.6 million favorable to the forecast through August 2023, primarily due to the timing of modifications and RCM activity for revenue fleet.
payload.subject: LIRR Materials and Supplies

tool_args.label: Claims Expenses $1.8M Unfavorable
tool_args.raw_text: Claims expenses were $(1.8) million unfavorable (primarily due to an increase in reserves).

payload.claim_text: Claims expenses were $(1.8) million unfavorable through August 2023, primarily due to an increase in reserves.
payload.subject: LIRR Claims Expenses

tool_args.label: Professional Services $5.5M Favorable
tool_args.raw_text: Professional Services were $5.5 million favorable (primarily due to the timing of fiber optic network expenses, sperry rail testing, and lower MTA chargebacks, partially offset by higher legal fees).

payload.claim_text: Professional Services were $5.5 million favorable through August 2023, primarily due to the timing of fiber optic network expenses, sperry rail testing, and lower MTA chargebacks, partially offset by higher legal fees.
payload.subject: LIRR Professional Services
